creator: matt@LUCIDA.CA
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hello:

This PR can be closed and ignored. I cvsup each morning at 0700 EST and
ironically it turns out that analog was updated one hour after that on the
17th by mharo. I did not realize this until my 0700 cvsup on the 18th.

Sure teaches me to do a to-the-minute cvsup before sending in a PR about a
port, I apologize for any time wasted by PR solvers. :)

Regards,
Matt Heckaman
